title: sumphero #4851
definition:
1) to bear or bring together
 2) to bear together or at the same time
    2a) to carry with others
    2b) to collect or contribute in order to help
    2c) to help, be profitable, be expedient
nasbUsage:

 2) to bear together or at the same time
